authorities.title: Classification of LLC acquisition transactions
authorities.body: Revenue Ruling 99-6 addresses federal income tax treatment of certain acquisitions involving single-member LLCs and the deemed asset consequences of those transactions. It is highly practical in transactional work because it bridges formal equity transfers and asset-style tax results.

authorities.title: Corporate interest limitation guidance
authorities.body: Notice 2018-28 provides early guidance on the business interest limitation rules, often relevant in leveraged acquisition planning where debt is pushed into operating groups or compared across acquisition structures.
